items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev is a slow-paced fighter with low activity.
items.quote: Magamemed Ankollay, a guy that is a very slow paced fighter, not a lot of activity.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev has a record of approximately 19-2.
items.quote: The guy's like 19-2 or something like that.

items.claim: Bogdan Guskov has a record of 18-3.
Kevin Holland is unable to compete due to an injury.
items.quote: Kevin Holland injured. He had to pull out.

items.claim: Conor McGregor sustained his knee injury during the fight rather than before it.
items.quote: Of course, we believe he was injured during the fight because nobody in their right mind is going to be able to jump off a bad knee and explode off the ground into midair.
